title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Columbia Asia

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Columbia Asia
jsonLd.description:
We at Columbia Asia are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Columbia Asia:
Columbia Asia is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia!
